positive: All 19 screenshots load as PNG/RGB images and are not blank/single-color.
Pixel content bounding boxes stay inside captured image dimensions; browser DOM evidence separately reports no body-level horizontal overflow at 375/768/1280.
Dominant palettes are neutral warm backgrounds/cards with dark text and muted borders, matching the calm admin-console design direction.
HTMX active/disabled screenshot diff is localized and confirms a row-state visual change rather than a full-page visual replacement.
Non-secure and unsupported fallback screenshots contain visible unsupported-WebAuthn state text in OCR/DOM evidence.

review.finding: OCR did not confidently extract expected text: Disabled
OCR did not confidently extract expected text: Active

method: Pillow pixel analysis plus Tesseract OCR; image model inspection was unavailable, so this artifact is a screenshot diff/layout review rather than an image-model review.
